description: Curated index of durable artifact families in agent-harness-lab.
source_of_truth_note: Repo files and git history are authoritative; this registry is a navigation aid.

items.name: Documentation
items.purpose: Orient operators and fresh sessions to doctrine, roles, routines, runtime behavior, metadata, quality, and navigation docs.
items.safe_use_notes: Use docs as reviewed guidance; verify implementation claims against actual files.

items.name: Promptset
items.purpose: Provide bounded prompt-execution work packages for fresh assistant sessions.
items.safe_use_notes: Run one prompt per fresh session unless the operator explicitly says otherwise.

items.name: Runbooks
items.purpose: Capture repeatable operator procedures for prompt execution, audits, preflight, repair, promotion, closeout, and commit packaging.
items.safe_use_notes: Runbooks guide human-assisted execution; they do not grant autonomous authority.

items.name: Templates
items.purpose: Provide reusable markdown skeletons for contracts, reports, handoffs, memory records, and run manifests.
items.safe_use_notes: Generated artifacts must be reviewed and filled with evidence before being treated as durable records.

items.name: Helper Scripts
items.purpose: Run dependency-free local checks and scaffold small workflow artifacts.
items.safe_use_notes: Scripts support the manual workflow and must not call providers or ingest raw transcripts.

items.name: Examples, Experiments, Reports, And Findings
items.purpose: Show concrete workflow scenarios and house evidence-oriented trial, report, and finding structures.
items.safe_use_notes: Examples are illustrative; promote patterns only through reviewed durable artifacts.

items.name: Metadata And Schemas
items.purpose: Define lightweight metadata records and schema-backed structures for run traceability and readiness outputs.
items.safe_use_notes: Metadata is derived from repo files and git history; do not treat it as independent truth.

items.name: Project Skills
items.purpose: Expose optional assistant-loadable instruction packages for recurring harness routines.
items.safe_use_notes: Load skills only when relevant; do not treat them as automatic discovery or hidden automation.

items.name: Role Packs
items.purpose: Provide pasteable startup briefs for Orchestrator, Lead, Worker, Reviewer, Auditor, and Repair Agent sessions.
items.safe_use_notes: Role packs guide manual fresh sessions; they do not spawn agents or grant autonomous authority.

items.name: Lane Playbooks
items.purpose: Describe manual lane routines for single-lane docs work, parallel docs and scripts work, repair, and promotion review.
items.safe_use_notes: Playbooks simulate hierarchy manually and must not require unavailable parallel automation.

items.name: Lane Templates
items.purpose: Provide compact lane brief, lane status, and Worker assignment skeletons for manual lane coordination.
items.safe_use_notes: Lane templates complement contract templates and should stay compact rather than duplicating every contract field.
